creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text: The issue "Berkeley DB library configured to support only private environments" when attempting multi-process access to the database affects all architectures that need to use POSIX mutexes on FreeBSD because all FreeBSD releases as of today (comment's date) including 11.0-RELEASE do _not_ support pthread_condattr_getpshared(..., PTHREAD_PROCESS_SHARED).
